messages.content:
translate from Chinese to English: MQ7233 RF868转0-10V通信模块，每一路可以配对8个设备，每增加一个设备MQ7233 自动后移一个通道，当8个通道配置满了以后，继续配对，设备会嘟嘟嘟叫几声后清除8个设备恢复出厂设置，
每一路的按键按下5秒，同样清空此路通道数据（建议：因为没有可视化的设备查看通道配置情况，所以尽量一个人配置好后，其他人继续配置时候，第一步删除配置数据，然后配置，这样设备关联会更清晰）

MQ7233 RF868 to 0-10V communication module, each channel can be paired with 8 devices. When an additional device is added, MQ7233 automatically shifts to the next channel. Once all 8 channels are filled, pairing can continue, but the device will make a series of beeping sounds to clear the 8 devices and restore factory settings.

If a button of any channel is pressed for 5 seconds, the corresponding channel data will also be cleared (suggestion: since there is no visual device to check the channel configuration, it is recommended for one person to configure it first, and when others continue to configure, the first step is to delete the configuration data and then configure it. This way, the device association will be clearer).
translate from Chinese to English: 配置好的按键，双击一下是开（开灯时间是1S亮度到100%），继续双击是关（关闭时间是2秒），左旋转是降低亮度，右旋转是增加亮度（步进5%）

For a configured button, double-clicking it once turns on the light (the light will reach 100% brightness in 1 second). Double-clicking it again will turn off the light (the light will take 2 seconds to turn off). Rotating it to the left will decrease the brightness, while rotating it to the right will increase the brightness (in 5% increments).
translate from Chinese to English: 支持的遥控器类型（只支持868MHz新协议）：M78、M58、M56、M18
Supported remote control types (only supports 868MHz new protocol): M78, M58, M56, M18.
translate from Chinese to English: 当过流保护的时候，对应路的开关会关闭，蜂鸣器会长鸣，对应指示灯间隔1S闪2次，一直闪烁，直到过流保护消除

When overcurrent protection is triggered, the corresponding switch of the circuit will be turned off, the buzzer will produce a continuous sound, and the corresponding indicator light will flash twice every 1 second, continuously blinking until the overcurrent protection is eliminated.

translate from Chinese to English:  短按配对键1，蜂鸣器短响一声，再按遥控2+3键（同时按5S）进入配对状态（1s闪烁），
看到按键一的指示灯快闪（200ms闪烁）（超时120秒退出），这时按遥控器1号键，配对模块第1路，模块蜂鸣器同时长响（约3秒）反馈配对成功，并退出，如不响表示没配对成功需再次同样操作

Short press the pairing button 1, the buzzer will emit a short beep. Then press the remote control buttons 2 and 3 together (hold for 5 seconds) to enter pairing mode (1 second blinking).

If the indicator light of button 1 is rapidly blinking (200ms blinking) (timeout after 120 seconds), press button 1 on the remote control. The pairing module will pair with the 1st channel, and the module's buzzer will emit a long beep (approximately 3 seconds) to indicate successful pairing and exit. If there is no beep, it means the pairing was unsuccessful and the same operation needs to be repeated.

translate from Chinese to English: 短按配对键2，蜂鸣器短响一声，再按遥控2+3键（同时按5S）进入配对状态（1s闪烁），
看到按键二的指示灯快闪（200ms闪烁）这时按遥控器2号键，配对模块第2路，模块蜂鸣器同时长响反馈配对成功，并退出，如不响表示没配对成功需再次同样操作

Short press the pairing button 2, the buzzer will emit a short beep. Then press the remote control buttons 2 and 3 together (hold for 5 seconds) to enter pairing mode (1 second blinking).

If the indicator light of button 2 is rapidly blinking (200ms blinking), press button 2 on the remote control. The pairing module will pair with the 2nd channel, and the module's buzzer will emit a long beep to indicate successful pairing and exit. If there is no beep, it means the pairing was unsuccessful and the same operation needs to be repeated.

translate from Chinese to English:  MQ7233 设备是双路0-10V调光，每一路可以配对8个设备，每增加一个设备MQ7233 自动后移一个通道，当8个通道配置满了以后，继续配对，设备会嘟嘟嘟叫几声后提示满了，然后不会继续添加配对，
每一路的按键按下5秒，同样清空此路通道数据（建议：因为没有可视化的设备查看通道配置情况，所以尽量一个人配置好后，其他人继续配置时候，第一步删除配置数据，然后配置，这样设备关联会更清晰）

The MQ7233 device is a dual-channel 0-10V dimming module. Each channel can be paired with 8 devices. When an additional device is added, the MQ7233 module automatically shifts to the next channel. Once all 8 channels are filled, pairing cannot continue. The device will beep several times to indicate that it is full and will not accept additional pairing.

If a button of any channel is pressed for 5 seconds, the corresponding channel data will be cleared. (Suggestion: Since there is no visual device to check the channel configuration, it is recommended for one person to configure it first. When others continue to configure, the first step is to delete the configuration data and then proceed with the new configuration. This way, the device association will be clearer.)
translate from Chinese to English: 配置好的按键，双击一下是开（开灯时间是1S亮度到100%），继续双击是关（关闭时间是2秒），左旋转是降低亮度，右旋转是增加亮度

For the configured button, a double-click turns on the light (lighting up to 100% brightness within 1 second). Double-clicking again will turn off the light (with a 2-second fade-out time). Rotating the button to the left decreases the brightness, while rotating it to the right increases the brightness (in 5% increments).
translate from Chinese to English:  MQ7233 2路RF868转0-10V通信模块
MQ7233 is a 2-channel RF868 to 0-10V communication module.
translate from Chinese to English: 功能
Function.
